pi_items.metadata_value: Demilitarized zone servers for perimeter monitoring
pi_items.verified_value: Demilitarized zone servers for perimeter monitoring
pi_items.source: Task description requests this exact description
Task description requests saving screenshot to this exact path
Task description instructs assigning 127.0.0.1. Confirmed by setup_eventlog_analyzer.sh which configures rsyslog to send logs to 127.0.0.1:514 and generates fake ssh logs to register the device

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a device group named 'DMZ_Servers' with the description 'Demilitarized zone servers for perimeter monitoring' and assigning the localhost device '127.0.0.1' to it. The environment's post_start script configures rsyslog to send logs to 127.0.0.1:514 and generates synthetic ssh logs, which automatically registers 127.0.0.1 in EventLog Analyzer as a device. The result screenshot must be saved to '/tmp/device_group_result.png'.
